case_title: MEHAMEDAWY, REYADH AL VS SELBY, MANTON L.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEHAMEDAWY, REYADH AL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON L. $1,684.28 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,734.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE. PLTF WAS GIVEN THE FORM RE COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO TRIAL COURTS UNIFORM LOCAL RULES OF COURT #8.15C.
